debug_info.goal:
a b : ℝ
ha : 0 < a
hb : 0 < b
this : 0 ∉ uIcc a b
⊢ ∫ (x : ℝ) in a..b, 1 / x + 1 / x ^ 2 = log b + 1 / a - log a - 1 / b

failed_attempts:
have ha0 : a ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt ha
  have hb0 : b ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt hb
  have hcont1 : ContinuousOn (fun x : ℝ => 1 / x) (uIcc a b) := by
    have hcont : ContinuousOn (fun x : ℝ => x⁻¹) ({0}ᶜ : Set ℝ) :=
      (continuousAt_inv₀ : ContinuousAt (fun x : ℝ => x⁻¹) _).continuousOn
    simpa [one_div] using hcont.mono (by
      intro x hx
      have hx0 : x ≠ 0 := by
        intro hx0
        have : (0 : ℝ) ∈ uIcc a b := by simpa [hx0] using hx
        exact this (by simpa using this)
      exact hx0)
  have hcont2 : ContinuousOn (fun x : ℝ => 1 / x ^ 2) (uIcc a b) := by
    have hcont : ContinuousOn (fun x : ℝ => (x ^ 2)⁻¹) ({0}ᶜ : Set ℝ) := by
      have : ContinuousOn (fun x : ℝ => x⁻¹) ({0}ᶜ : Set ℝ) :=
        (continuousAt_inv₀ : ContinuousAt (fun x : ℝ => x⁻¹) _).continuousOn
      simpa using this.comp (by
        refine (continuous_pow 2).continuousOn) (by
        intro x hx
        have hx0 : x ≠ 0 := by
          intro hx0
          have : (0 : ℝ) ∈ uIcc a b := by simpa [hx0] using hx
          exact this (by simpa using this)
        have : x ^ 2 ≠ 0 := by
          simpa [pow_two] using mul_ne_zero hx0 hx0
        simpa using this)
    simpa [one_div] using hcont.mono (by
      intro x hx
      have hx0 : x ≠ 0 := by
        intro hx0
        have : (0 : ℝ) ∈ uIcc a b := by simpa [hx0] using hx
        exact this (by simpa using this)
      exact hx0)
  have hderiv_log : ∀ x ∈ uIcc a b, HasDerivAt Real.log (1 / x) x := by
    intro x hx
    have hx0 : x ≠ 0 := by
      intro hx0
      have : (0 : ℝ) ∈ uIcc a b := by simpa [hx0] using hx
      exact this (by simpa using this)
    simpa [one_div] using (Real.hasDerivAt_log hx0)
  have hderiv_inv : ∀ x ∈ uIcc a b, HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => -(1 / x)) (1 / x ^ 2) x := by
    intro x hx
    have hx0 : x ≠ 0 := by
      intro hx0
      have : (0 : ℝ) ∈ uIcc a b := by simpa [hx0] using hx
      exact this (by simpa using this)
    have : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => x⁻¹) (-x⁻²) x := by
      simpa using (hasDerivAt_inv₀ hx0)
    have : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => -(x⁻¹)) (x⁻²) x := by
      simpa using this.neg
    simpa [one_div, pow_two] using this
  have hFTC1 :
      ∫ x in a..b, 1 / x = Real.log b - Real.log a := by
    simpa using intervalIntegral.integral_eq_sub_of_hasDerivAt_of_continuousOn
      (f := Real.log) (f' := fun x => 1 / x) (a := a) (b := b) hcont1 hderiv_log
  have hFTC2 :
      ∫ x in a..b, 1 / x ^ 2 = (-(1 / b)) - (-(1 / a)) := by
    simpa using intervalIntegral.integral_eq_sub_of_hasDerivAt_of_continuousOn
      (f := fun x : ℝ => -(1 / x)) (f' := fun x => 1 / x ^ 2) (a := a) (b := b)
      hcont2 hderiv_inv
  have hsum :
      ∫ x in a..b, (1 / x + 1 / x ^ 2) = (∫ x in a..b, 1 / x) + (∫ x in a..b, 1 / x ^ 2) := by
    simpa [intervalIntegral.integral_add] using (intervalIntegral.integral_add (a := a) (b := b)
      (f := fun x : ℝ => 1 / x) (g := fun x : ℝ => 1 / x ^ 2))
  calc
    ∫ x in a..b, 1 / x + 1 / x ^ 2
        = (∫ x in a..b, 1 / x) + (∫ x in a..b, 1 / x ^ 2) := by
          simpa using hsum
    _ = (Real.log b - Real.log a) + ((-(1 / b)) - (-(1 / a))) := by
          simp [hFTC1, hFTC2]
    _ = log b + 1 / a - log a - 1 / b := by ring

simpa [one_div, div_eq_mul_inv, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc, sub_eq_add_neg, pow_two,
    mul_add, add_mul] using
    (intervalIntegral.integral_add
      (f := fun x : ℝ => (x : ℝ)⁻¹) (g := fun x : ℝ => (x : ℝ)⁻²) (a := a) (b := b)).trans
      (by
        simp [intervalIntegral.integral_inv, intervalIntegral.integral_inv_sq, this, ha.ne',
          hb.ne', sub_eq_add_neg, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm])

have hcont : ContinuousOn (fun x : ℝ => 1 / x + 1 / x ^ 2) (uIcc a b) := by
    have h1 : ContinuousOn (fun x : ℝ => 1 / x) (uIcc a b) := by
      have : ContinuousOn (fun x : ℝ => x⁻¹) (uIcc a b) :=
        (continuousOn_inv₀).mono (by intro x hx; exact this hx)
      simpa [one_div] using this
    have h2 : ContinuousOn (fun x : ℝ => 1 / x ^ 2) (uIcc a b) := by
      have : ContinuousOn (fun x : ℝ => (x ^ 2)⁻¹) (uIcc a b) :=
        (continuousOn_inv₀).comp
          (by
            have : ContinuousOn (fun x : ℝ => x ^ 2) (uIcc a b) :=
              (continuous_const.mul (continuous_id.pow 2)).continuousOn
            simpa [pow_two] using this)
          (by
            intro x hx
            have hx0 : x ≠ 0 := by
              intro hx0
              exact this (by simpa [hx0] using hx)
            simpa [pow_two, hx0] )
      simpa [one_div] using this
    simpa [ContinuousOn.add] using h1.add h2
  have hderiv :
      (deriv (fun x : ℝ => log x - 1 / x)) = fun x => 1 / x + 1 / x ^ 2 := by
    funext x
    by_cases hx : x = 0
    · subst hx
      simp
    · have hx0 : x ≠ 0 := hx
      simp [deriv_sub, deriv_log, hx0, one_div, pow_two, div_eq_mul_inv, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm,
        mul_comm, sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc]
  have hprim :
      intervalIntegral.integral a b (fun x : ℝ => 1 / x + 1 / x ^ 2) =
        (fun x : ℝ => log x - 1 / x) b - (fun x : ℝ => log x - 1 / x) a := by
    have hderivOn :
        DerivOn (fun x : ℝ => log x - 1 / x) (fun x => 1 / x + 1 / x ^ 2) (uIcc a b) := by
      intro x hx
      have hx0 : x ≠ 0 := by
        intro hx0
        exact this (by simpa [hx0] using hx)
      have hxpos : 0 < x := by
        have ha' : a ≤ x := by
          have : a ≤ min a b := by exact le_min le_rfl (le_trans (le_of_lt ha) (le_of_lt hb))
          exact le_trans (le_trans this (min_le_left _ _)) (by simpa [uIcc] using hx.1)
        exact lt_of_lt_of_le ha hx.1
      have : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => log x - 1 / x) (1 / x + 1 / x ^ 2) x := by
        have hlog : HasDerivAt log (1 / x) x := by
          simpa [one_div] using (Real.hasDerivAt_log hxpos.ne')
        have hinv : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => 1 / x) (-(1 / x ^ 2)) x := by
          simpa [one_div, pow_two] using (hasDerivAt_inv hx0)
        have : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => log x - 1 / x) (1 / x - (-(1 / x ^ 2))) x :=
          hlog.sub hinv
        simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm] using this
      exact this.hasDerivWithinAt
    simpa using intervalIntegral.integral_eq_sub_of_hasDerivOn_of_continuousOn hderivOn hcont
  have ha0 : a ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt ha
  have hb0 : b ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt hb
  have halog : 0 < a := ha
  have hblog : 0 < b := hb
  simp [hprim, sub_eq_add_neg, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm, one_div, ha0, hb0, halog, hblog]

have hcont : IntervalIntegrable (fun x : ℝ => 1 / x + 1 / x ^ 2) volume a b := by
    have h1 : IntervalIntegrable (fun x : ℝ => 1 / x) volume a b := by
      refine (intervalIntegrable_inv ?_).1
      simpa [uIcc, Set.mem_Icc, not_and_or, not_le] using this
    have h2 : IntervalIntegrable (fun x : ℝ => 1 / x ^ 2) volume a b := by
      refine (intervalIntegrable_inv ?_).2
      · exact (intervalIntegrable_pow ?_).1
        simpa [uIcc, Set.mem_Icc, not_and_or, not_le] using this
      · intro x hx
        have hx0 : x ≠ 0 := by
          intro hx0
          have : (0 : ℝ) ∈ uIcc a b := by simpa [hx0] using hx
          exact this.elim this
        simpa [pow_two, hx0] using mul_ne_zero hx0 hx0
    simpa [add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using h1.add h2
  calc
    ∫ x in a..b, 1 / x + 1 / x ^ 2
        = (log b - log a) + (- (1 / b) - (- (1 / a))) := by
            have hlog :
                ∫ x in a..b, (1 / x : ℝ) = log b - log a := by
              simpa using intervalIntegral.integral_inv (a := a) (b := b) this
            have hinv2 :
                ∫ x in a..b, (1 / x ^ 2 : ℝ) = (- (1 / b)) - (- (1 / a)) := by
              have hderiv : (fun x : ℝ => - (1 / x))' = fun x : ℝ => 1 / x ^ 2 := by
                funext x
                by_cases hx : x = 0
                · simp [hx]
                · have : (x ^ 2) ≠ 0 := by
                    simpa [pow_two] using mul_ne_zero hx hx
                  simp [one_div, pow_two, hx, this, div_eq_mul_inv, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm]
              have hcont' :
                  ContinuousOn (fun x : ℝ => - (1 / x)) (uIcc a b) := by
                refine (continuous_const.sub ?_).neg.continuousOn
                have : ContinuousOn (fun x : ℝ => (1 / x : ℝ)) (uIcc a b) := by
                  refine (continuousOn_inv₀ ?_).comp ?_
                  · intro x hx
                    intro hx0
                    have : (0 : ℝ) ∈ uIcc a b := by simpa [hx0] using hx
                    exact this.elim this
                  · exact continuousOn_id
                simpa using this
              have hderiv' :
                  ∀ x ∈ uIcc a b, HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => - (1 / x)) (1 / x ^ 2) x := by
                intro x hx
                have hx0 : x ≠ 0 := by
                  intro hx0
                  have : (0 : ℝ) ∈ uIcc a b := by simpa [hx0] using hx
                  exact this.elim this
                simpa [one_div, pow_two, hx0] using
                  (by
                    have : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => (1 / x : ℝ)) (- (1 / x ^ 2)) x := by
                      simpa [one_div, pow_two, hx0] using (Real.hasDerivAt_inv hx0)
                    simpa using this.neg)
              have := intervalIntegral.integral_deriv_eq_sub (a := a) (b := b)
                (f := fun x : ℝ => - (1 / x)) (f' := fun x : ℝ => 1 / x ^ 2) hcont' hderiv'
              simpa using this
            simp [intervalIntegral.integral_add, hcont, hlog, hinv2, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm]
    _ = log b + 1 / a - log a - 1 / b := by ring

have hcont : ContinuousOn (fun x : ℝ => log x - 1 / x) (uIcc a b) := by
    have hlog : ContinuousOn (fun x : ℝ => log x) (uIcc a b) :=
      (continuous_log.continuousOn)
    have hinv : ContinuousOn (fun x : ℝ => (1 : ℝ) / x) (uIcc a b) := by
      simpa [one_div] using (continuousOn_id.inv₀ this)
    simpa [sub_eq_add_neg] using hlog.sub hinv
  have hderiv :
      (∀ x ∈ uIcc a b, HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => log x - 1 / x) (1 / x + 1 / x ^ 2) x) := by
    intro x hx
    have hx0 : x ≠ 0 := by
      have : 0 ∉ uIcc a b := this
      exact fun h => this (by simpa [h] using hx)
    have hlog : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => log x) (1 / x) x := by
      simpa [one_div] using Real.hasDerivAt_log hx0
    have hinv : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => (1 : ℝ) / x) (- (1 / x ^ 2)) x := by
      simpa [one_div, pow_two] using (hasDerivAt_inv₀ hx0 (1 : ℝ))
    have : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => log x - (1 / x)) (1 / x - (-(1 / x ^ 2))) x :=
      hlog.sub hinv
    simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm, sub_neg_eq_add] using this
  have hFTC :
      ∫ x in a..b, (1 / x + 1 / x ^ 2) = (log b - 1 / b) - (log a - 1 / a) := by
    simpa using
      (intervalIntegral.integral_eq_sub_of_hasDerivAt_of_continuousOn
        (a := a) (b := b) (f := fun x : ℝ => log x - 1 / x) (f' := fun x : ℝ => 1 / x + 1 / x ^ 2)
        hderiv hcont)
  have : (log b - 1 / b) - (log a - 1 / a) = log b + 1 / a - log a - 1 / b := by
    ring
  simpa [hFTC, this]

have hcont₁ : ContinuousOn (fun x : ℝ => (1 : ℝ) / x) (uIcc a b) := by
    refine (continuousOn_const.div ?_ ?_).congr ?_
    · exact continuousOn_id
    · intro x hx
      have hx0 : x ≠ 0 := by
        intro hx0
        have : (0 : ℝ) ∈ uIcc a b := by simpa [hx0] using hx
        exact this.elim (by simpa [uIcc] using this)
      simpa using hx0
    · intro x hx; simp
  have hcont₂ : ContinuousOn (fun x : ℝ => (1 : ℝ) / x ^ 2) (uIcc a b) := by
    refine (continuousOn_const.div ?_ ?_).congr ?_
    · exact (continuousOn_id.pow 2)
    · intro x hx
      have hx0 : x ≠ 0 := by
        intro hx0
        have : (0 : ℝ) ∈ uIcc a b := by simpa [hx0] using hx
        exact this.elim (by simpa [uIcc] using this)
      have : x ^ 2 ≠ 0 := by
        simpa [pow_two] using mul_ne_zero hx0 hx0
      simpa using this
    · intro x hx; simp
  have hcont : ContinuousOn (fun x : ℝ => (1 : ℝ) / x + (1 : ℝ) / x ^ 2) (uIcc a b) :=
    (hcont₁.add hcont₂)
  have hder₁ :
      ∀ x ∈ uIcc a b, HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => log x) ((1 : ℝ) / x) x := by
    intro x hx
    have hx0 : x ≠ 0 := by
      intro hx0
      have : (0 : ℝ) ∈ uIcc a b := by simpa [hx0] using hx
      exact this.elim (by simpa [uIcc] using this)
    have hxpos : 0 < x := by
      have hx' : x ∈ Set.Icc (min a b) (max a b) := by simpa [uIcc] using hx
      have ha' : 0 < min a b := lt_min_iff.mpr ⟨ha, hb⟩
      exact lt_of_lt_of_le ha' hx'.1
    simpa [one_div] using (Real.hasDerivAt_log hxpos)
  have hder₂ :
      ∀ x ∈ uIcc a b, HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => -(1 : ℝ) / x) ((1 : ℝ) / x ^ 2) x := by
    intro x hx
    have hx0 : x ≠ 0 := by
      intro hx0
      have : (0 : ℝ) ∈ uIcc a b := by simpa [hx0] using hx
      exact this.elim (by simpa [uIcc] using this)
    have h : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => (1 : ℝ) / x) (-(1 : ℝ) / x ^ 2) x := by
      simpa [one_div, pow_two, div_eq_mul_inv, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm] using
        (hasDerivAt_inv (x := x)).const_mul (1 : ℝ)
    simpa [one_div] using h.neg
  have hder :
      ∀ x ∈ uIcc a b,
        HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => log x - (1 : ℝ) / x) ((1 : ℝ) / x + (1 : ℝ) / x ^ 2) x := by
    intro x hx
    have h1 := hder₁ x hx
    have h2 := hder₂ x hx
    simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm] using h1.add h2
  have hint :=
    intervalIntegral.integral_eq_sub_of_hasDerivAt_of_continuousOn
      (a := a) (b := b)
      (f := fun x : ℝ => (1 : ℝ) / x + (1 : ℝ) / x ^ 2)
      (F := fun x : ℝ => log x - (1 : ℝ) / x) hder hcont
  simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, one_div] using hint

simpa [one_div, div_eq_mul_inv, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc, sub_eq_add_neg] using
    (intervalIntegral.integral_add
      (f := fun x : ℝ => (1 : ℝ) / x)
      (g := fun x : ℝ => (1 : ℝ) / x ^ 2)
      (a := a) (b := b)) ▸ by
        simpa [one_div, div_eq_mul_inv, sub_eq_add_neg, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm] using
          (by
            have h1 :
                (∫ x in a..b, (1 : ℝ) / x) = log b - log a := by
              simpa [one_div, div_eq_mul_inv, sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using
                (intervalIntegral.integral_inv (a := a) (b := b) this)
            have h2 :
                (∫ x in a..b, (1 : ℝ) / x ^ 2) = (1 / a) - (1 / b) := by
              simpa [one_div, div_eq_mul_inv, pow_two, sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using
                (intervalIntegral.integral_inv_sq (a := a) (b := b) this)
            simpa [h1, h2, sub_eq_add_neg, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm])

simpa [one_div, div_eq_mul_inv, pow_two, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc, sub_eq_add_neg,
    mul_add, add_mul, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm] using
    (intervalIntegral.integral_add
      (f := fun x : ℝ => (x⁻¹))
      (g := fun x : ℝ => (x ^ 2)⁻¹)
      (a := a) (b := b)).trans
      (by
        simp [intervalIntegral.integral_inv, this, intervalIntegral.integral_inv_pow_two, this,
          sub_eq_add_neg, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm])

simpa [one_div, pow_two, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc, sub_eq_add_neg, div_eq_mul_inv,
    mul_add, add_mul, inv_mul_eq_iff_eq_mul₀] using
    (intervalIntegral.integral_add (f := fun x : ℝ => (1 / x)) (g := fun x : ℝ => (1 / x ^ 2)) (a := a) (b := b)).trans
      (by
        simp [intervalIntegral.integral_inv, intervalIntegral.integral_inv_sq, ha.ne', hb.ne'])

have ha0 : a ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt ha
  have hb0 : b ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt hb
  have hcont : ContinuousOn (fun x : ℝ => 1 / x + 1 / x ^ 2) (uIcc a b) := by
    have h1 : ContinuousOn (fun x : ℝ => 1 / x) (uIcc a b) := by
      refine (continuousOn_const.div ?_ ?_).congr ?_
      · exact continuousOn_id
      · intro x hx
        have : x ≠ 0 := by
          intro hx0
          exact this (by simpa [hx0] using hx)
        simpa [one_div, this]
      · intro x hx; rfl
    have h2 : ContinuousOn (fun x : ℝ => 1 / x ^ 2) (uIcc a b) := by
      have : ContinuousOn (fun x : ℝ => x ^ 2) (uIcc a b) := by
        exact (continuous_id.pow 2).continuousOn
      refine (continuousOn_const.div this ?_).congr ?_
      · intro x hx
        have hx0 : x ≠ 0 := by
          intro hx0
          exact this_1 (by simpa [hx0] using hx)
        have : x ^ 2 ≠ 0 := by simpa [pow_two] using mul_ne_zero hx0 hx0
        simpa [one_div, this]
      · intro x hx; rfl
    exact h1.add h2
  have hder :
      ∀ x ∈ uIcc a b,
        HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => log x - 1 / x) (1 / x + 1 / x ^ 2) x := by
    intro x hx
    have hx0 : x ≠ 0 := by
      intro hx0
      exact this (by simpa [hx0] using hx)
    have hxpos : 0 < x := by
      have hx' : x ∈ Set.Icc (min a b) (max a b) := by
        simpa [uIcc] using hx
      have hmin : 0 < min a b := lt_min ha hb
      exact lt_of_lt_of_le hmin hx'.1
    have hlog : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => log x) (1 / x) x := by
      simpa [one_div] using Real.hasDerivAt_log hxpos
    have hneg : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => - (1 / x)) (1 / x ^ 2) x := by
      have hinv : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => (1 / x)) (-(1 / x ^ 2)) x := by
        simpa [one_div] using (hasDerivAt_inv hx0)
      simpa using hinv.neg
    have : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => log x + (-(1 / x))) (1 / x + 1 / x ^ 2) x := by
      simpa using hlog.add hneg
    simpa [sub_eq_add_neg] using this
  have hFTC :=
    intervalIntegral.integral_eq_sub_of_hasDerivAt_of_continuousOn
      (f := fun x : ℝ => log x - 1 / x)
      (f' := fun x : ℝ => 1 / x + 1 / x ^ 2)
      (a := a) (b := b) hder hcont
  simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, one_div, ha0, hb0, pow_two, div_eq_mul_inv, add_assoc, add_left_comm,
    add_comm, sub_eq_add_neg, add_mul, mul_add, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm] using hFTC

simpa [one_div, div_eq_mul_inv, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc, sub_eq_add_neg] using
    (intervalIntegral.integral_add
        (f := fun x : ℝ => (x : ℝ)⁻¹)
        (g := fun x : ℝ => (x : ℝ)⁻²)
        (a := a) (b := b)).trans <|
      by
        simp [intervalIntegral.integral_inv, intervalIntegral.integral_inv_sq, this, ha.ne', hb.ne',
          one_div, div_eq_mul_inv, pow_two, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm, sub_eq_add_neg,
          add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc]

have ha0 : a ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt ha
  have hb0 : b ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt hb
  have hderiv :
      (∀ x ∈ Set.uIcc a b,
        HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => log x - 1 / x) (1 / x + 1 / x ^ 2) x) := by
    intro x hx
    have hx0 : x ≠ 0 := by
      have hxpos : 0 < x := lt_of_lt_of_le ha hx.1
      exact ne_of_gt hxpos
    have hlog : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => log x) (1 / x) x := by
      simpa [one_div] using Real.hasDerivAt_log (by exact hx0)
    have hneg : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => - (1 / x)) (1 / x ^ 2) x := by
      simpa [one_div, pow_two] using (hasDerivAt_inv (x := x)).neg
    simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm, pow_two] using hlog.add hneg
  have hcont : IntervalIntegrable (fun x : ℝ => 1 / x + 1 / x ^ 2) volume a b := by
    refine (intervalIntegrable_iff_integrableOn_uIcc_of_le (le_total a b).resolve_left ?_).1 ?_
    · exact (le_total a b).resolve_left
    ·
      have : IntegrableOn (fun x : ℝ => 1 / x + 1 / x ^ 2) (Set.uIcc a b) volume := by
        have hcont' :
            ContinuousOn (fun x : ℝ => 1 / x + 1 / x ^ 2) (Set.uIcc a b) := by
          have h0 : (0 : ℝ) ∉ Set.uIcc a b := this
          have hne : ∀ x ∈ Set.uIcc a b, x ≠ 0 := by
            intro x hx; exact fun hx0 => h0 (hx0 ▸ hx)
          have h1 : ContinuousOn (fun x : ℝ => 1 / x) (Set.uIcc a b) := by
            intro x hx
            have : x ≠ 0 := hne x hx
            simpa [one_div] using (continuousAt_const.div continuousAt_id this).continuousWithinAt
          have h2 : ContinuousOn (fun x : ℝ => 1 / x ^ 2) (Set.uIcc a b) := by

    have hderiv' :

    simpa using
      intervalIntegral.integral_eq_sub_of_hasDerivAt_of_le
        (a := a) (b := b) (f := fun x : ℝ => 1 / x + 1 / x ^ 2)
        (F := fun x : ℝ => log x - 1 / x) (by
          intro x hx; exact (hderiv' x hx).hasDerivWithinAt) (by
          exact (le_total a b).resolve_left) hcont
  have : (log b - 1 / b) - (log a - 1 / a) = log b + 1 / a - log a - 1 / b := by
    ring
  simpa [hFTC, this]

    using (intervalIntegral.integral_add

    by

      have I2 :

have hab : a ≠ b := by
    rintro rfl
    simpa using ha.ne'
  have h0a : a ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt ha
  have h0b : b ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt hb
  have h0 : ∀ x ∈ [[a, b]], x ≠ 0 := by
    intro x hx
    exact fun hx0 => this (by simpa [hx0] using hx)
  have hderiv1 : ∀ x ∈ [[a, b]], HasDerivAt Real.log (1 / x) x := by
    intro x hx

  have hderiv2 : ∀ x ∈ [[a, b]], HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => - (1 / x)) (1 / x ^ 2) x := by
    intro x hx
    have hx0 : x ≠ 0 := h0 x hx
    have : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => 1 / x) (-(1 / x ^ 2)) x := by

    simpa [neg_add, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using this.neg
  have hderiv :

    refine (intervalIntegrable_iff_integrableOn_uIcc_of_le ?_).2 ?_
    · exact le_of_lt (lt_of_le_of_ne (le_of_lt ha) (by simpa using h0a))
    · have : ContinuousOn (fun x : ℝ => 1 / x + 1 / x ^ 2) [[a, b]] := by
        have h1 : ContinuousOn (fun x : ℝ => 1 / x) [[a, b]] :=

            intro x hx
            simpa using h0 x hx))
        have h2 : ContinuousOn (fun x : ℝ => 1 / x ^ 2) [[a, b]] :=
          (continuousOn_const.div (continuousOn_id.pow _) (by
            intro x hx
            have hx0 : x ≠ 0 := h0 x hx
            simpa [pow_two] using (pow_ne_zero 2 hx0)))
        simpa [one_div, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using h1.add h2
      exact this.integrableOn_compact

      ∫ x in a..b, 1 / x + 1 / x ^ 2 =
        (Real.log b - 1 / b) - (Real.log a - 1 / a) := by
    have := intervalIntegral.integral_eq_sub_of_hasDerivAt_of_le hab.le hderiv hcont
    simpa using this
  calc
    ∫ x in a..b, 1 / x + 1 / x ^ 2
        = (Real.log b - 1 / b) - (Real.log a - 1 / a) := hFTC
    _ = log b + 1 / a - log a - 1 / b := by ring

      (a := a) (b := b))

have ha0 : a ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt ha
  have hb0 : b ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt hb
  have hcont : ContinuousOn (fun x : ℝ => log x - 1 / x) (uIcc a b) := by
    refine (continuous_log.continuousOn.mono ?_).sub ?_
    · intro x hx
      exact ne_of_gt (lt_of_lt_of_le ha (uIcc_subset_uIcc (le_rfl) (le_rfl) hx).1)
    ·
      have : ContinuousOn (fun x : ℝ => (1 : ℝ) / x) (uIcc a b) :=

          intro x hx

  have hderiv :

    intro x hx
    have hx0 : x ≠ 0 := by
      exact (mem_uIcc.mp hx).1.ne' (lt_of_lt_of_le ha (le_of_min_le_left (mem_uIcc.mp hx)))
    have hlog : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => log x) (1 / x) x := by
      have hxpos : 0 < x := lt_of_lt_of_le ha (le_of_min_le_left (mem_uIcc.mp hx))
      simpa [one_div] using (Real.hasDerivAt_log hxpos.ne')
    have h1 : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => (1 : ℝ) / x) (-(1 / x ^ 2)) x := by

    exact this

        (fun x : ℝ => (1 / x + 1 / x ^ 2)) (by

          exact (hderiv x hx).intervalIntegrable

  calc

have ha0 : a ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt ha
  have hb0 : b ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt hb
  have hcont : ContinuousOn (fun x : ℝ => 1 / x + 1 / x ^ 2) (uIcc a b) := by
    have h1 : ContinuousOn (fun x : ℝ => 1 / x) (uIcc a b) := by
      simpa [one_div] using (continuousOn_const.div continuousOn_id this)
    have h2 : ContinuousOn (fun x : ℝ => 1 / x ^ 2) (uIcc a b) := by
      have hx2 : ContinuousOn (fun x : ℝ => x ^ 2) (uIcc a b) :=
        (continuous_id.pow 2).continuousOn
      have hne : ∀ x ∈ uIcc a b, (x ^ 2 : ℝ) ≠ 0 := by
        intro x hx
        have hx0 : x ≠ 0 := by
          exact fun h => this (by simpa [h] using hx)
        exact pow_ne_zero 2 hx0
      simpa [one_div] using (continuousOn_const.div hx2 hne)
    simpa [ContinuousOn] using h1.add h2
  have hder :
      ∀ x ∈ uIcc a b,
        HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => log x - 1 / x) (1 / x + 1 / x ^ 2) x := by
    intro x hx
    have hx0 : x ≠ 0 := by
      exact fun h => this (by simpa [h] using hx)
    have hxpos : 0 < x := by
      have : x ∈ Icc a b ∨ x ∈ Icc b a := by
        simpa [uIcc] using hx
      rcases this with hx' | hx'
      · exact lt_of_lt_of_le ha hx'.1
      · exact lt_of_lt_of_le hb hx'.1
    have hlog : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => log x) (1 / x) x := by
      simpa [one_div] using Real.hasDerivAt_log hxpos
    have hneg : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => -(1 / x)) (1 / x ^ 2) x := by
      have hdiv : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => 1 / x) (-(1 / x ^ 2)) x := by
        simpa [one_div] using (hasDerivAt_const_div x (1 : ℝ))

    have : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => log x + (-(1 / x))) (1 / x + 1 / x ^ 2) x :=
      hlog.add hneg
    simpa [sub_eq_add_neg] using this
  have hint :
      ∫ x in a..b, (1 / x + 1 / x ^ 2) =

    have hder' :
        ∀ x ∈ [[a, b]],

      exact hder x (by simpa [uIcc] using hx)
    have hcont' :
        ContinuousOn (fun x : ℝ => 1 / x + 1 / x ^ 2) [[a, b]] := by

  have : (log b - 1 / b) - (log a - 1 / a) = log b + 1 / a - log a - 1 / b := by
    ring
  simpa [this] using hint

have ha0 : a ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt ha
  have hb0 : b ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt hb
  have hderiv :
      ∀ x ∈ uIcc a b,
        HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => log x - 1 / x) (1 / x + 1 / x ^ 2) x := by
    intro x hx
    have hx0 : x ≠ 0 := by
      have hx' : 0 ∈ uIcc a b → False := by
        intro h0
        exact this h0
      exact fun h => hx' (by simpa [h] using hx)
    have hlog : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => log x) (1 / x) x := by
      simpa [one_div] using Real.hasDerivAt_log (by exact hx0)
    have hinv : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => - (1 / x)) (1 / x ^ 2) x := by
      have : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => 1 / x) (- (1 / x ^ 2)) x := by
        simpa [one_div, pow_two, hx0] using (hasDerivAt_inv x)
      simpa [neg_mul, mul_neg, neg_neg, one_div] using this.neg
    simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm] using hlog.add hinv
  have hFTC :=
    intervalIntegral.integral_eq_sub_of_hasDerivAt_of_le (a := a) (b := b)

      (by
        intro x hx
        exact (hderiv x hx).intervalIntegrable (by
          simpa using (hderiv x hx).continuousAt))
      (by
        intro x hx
        exact hderiv x hx) (le_total a b).1
  have hFTC' :
      ∫ x in a..b, 1 / x + 1 / x ^ 2 =
        (log b - 1 / b) - (log a - 1 / a) := by
    simpa [sub_eq_add_neg] using hFTC
  calc
    ∫ x in a..b, 1 / x + 1 / x ^ 2
        = (log b - 1 / b) - (log a - 1 / a) := hFTC'
    _ = log b + 1 / a - log a - 1 / b := by ring

have hcont : ContinuousOn (fun x : ℝ => log x - 1 / x) [[a, b]] := by
    have h0 : (0 : ℝ) ∉ [[a, b]] := this
    exact (continuousOn_log.sub (continuousOn_const.div continuousOn_id)).sub

    intro x hx
    have hx0 : x ≠ 0 := by
      have : (0 : ℝ) ∉ [[a, b]] := this

      ( (Real.hasDerivAt_log hx0).sub ((hasDerivAt_const_div _).trans (by

  have hint :=
    intervalIntegral.integral_eq_sub_of_hasDerivAt_of_continuousOn
      (f := fun x : ℝ => log x - 1 / x)
      (f' := fun x : ℝ => 1 / x + 1 / x ^ 2)
      (a := a) (b := b) hderiv hcont
  simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm, one_div] using hint

have ha0 : a ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt ha
  have hb0 : b ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt hb
  have hderiv :
      Deriv (fun x : ℝ => log x - 1 / x) = fun x => 1 / x + 1 / x ^ 2 := by
    funext x

    · subst hx

    · have : x ≠ 0 := hx

have ha0 : a ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt ha
  have hb0 : b ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt hb

    intro x hx

        exact (hderiv x hx))

have hab : a ≠ b := by
    rintro rfl
    exact (lt_irrefl _ ha)
  have ha0 : a ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt ha
  have hb0 : b ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt hb
  have hcont1 : ContinuousOn (fun x : ℝ => (1 : ℝ) / x) (uIcc a b) :=
    (continuous_const.div continuous_id ha0).continuousOn
  have hcont2 : ContinuousOn (fun x : ℝ => (1 : ℝ) / x ^ 2) (uIcc a b) := by
    have : Continuous fun x : ℝ => (1 : ℝ) / x ^ 2 :=
      continuous_const.div (continuous_id.pow 2) (by
        intro x hx
        have : x ≠ 0 := by
          intro hx0
          have : (0 : ℝ) ∈ uIcc a b := by
            simpa [hx0] using hx
          exact this.1 (this)
        simpa [pow_two] using sq_ne_zero this)
    exact this.continuousOn
  have hderiv :
      (fun x : ℝ => log x - 1 / x)' = fun x => 1 / x + 1 / x ^ 2 := by
    funext x
    have hx : x ≠ 0 := by
      intro hx0
      have : (0 : ℝ) ∈ uIcc a b := by
        have : x ∈ uIcc a b := by
          have : x ∈ [[a, b]] := by
            have : a ≤ x ∧ x ≤ b := by
              have : a ≤ b := le_of_lt (lt_of_lt_of_le ha (le_of_lt hb))
              exact ⟨le_trans (le_of_lt ha) this, le_trans this (le_of_lt hb)⟩
            exact this

        simpa [hx0] using this
      exact this.1 (this)
    simp [deriv_sub, deriv_log, hx, deriv_one_div, deriv_pow, pow_two, add_comm, add_left_comm,
      add_assoc, sub_eq_add_neg, div_eq_mul_inv, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm]
  have hFTC :
      ∫ x in a..b, 1 / x + 1 / x ^ 2 = (log b - 1 / b) - (log a - 1 / a) := by
    have hcont :
        ContinuousOn (fun x : ℝ => 1 / x + 1 / x ^ 2) (uIcc a b) := by
      exact (hcont1.add hcont2)
    simpa [hderiv] using
      intervalIntegral.integral_deriv_eq_sub_of_hasDerivAt (f := fun x : ℝ => log x - 1 / x)
        (f' := fun x : ℝ => 1 / x + 1 / x ^ 2) (a := a) (b := b) hcont (by
          intro x hx
          have hx0 : x ≠ 0 := by
            intro hx0
            have : (0 : ℝ) ∈ uIcc a b := by simpa [hx0] using hx
            exact this.1 this
          have hxpos : 0 < x := by
            have hx' : a ≤ x := (mem_uIcc.mp hx).1
            exact lt_of_lt_of_le ha hx'
          have hlog : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => log x) (1 / x) x := by
            simpa [one_div] using Real.hasDerivAt_log hxpos
          have hdiv : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => (1 : ℝ) / x) (-(1 / x ^ 2)) x := by
            simpa [one_div] using (hasDerivAt_inv₀ hx0)
          have : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => log x - 1 / x) (1 / x + 1 / x ^ 2) x := by
            simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm, one_div, pow_two] using
              hlog.sub hdiv
          exact this.hasDerivWithinAt)
  have : (log b - 1 / b) - (log a - 1 / a) = log b + 1 / a - log a - 1 / b := by
    ring
  simpa [hFTC, this]

have hab : a ≠ b := by
    intro h
    have : (0 : ℝ) < a := ha
    simpa [h] using this.ne'
  have ha0 : a ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt ha
  have hb0 : b ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt hb
  have hcont : ContinuousOn (fun x : ℝ => log x - 1 / x) (uIcc a b) := by
    have hlog : ContinuousOn (fun x : ℝ => log x) (uIcc a b) := by
      refine (continuousAt_log.continuousOn ?_)
      intro x hx
      have hx0 : x ≠ 0 := by
        intro hx0
        have : (0 : ℝ) = x := hx0.symm
        exact this (this ▸ this)
      have hxpos : 0 < x := by
        by_contra hnx
        have hxle : x ≤ 0 := le_of_not_gt hnx
        have hxge : 0 ≤ x := by
          have : 0 ≤ a := le_of_lt ha
          have hx' : a ≤ x ∧ x ≤ b := by
            simpa [uIcc, Set.mem_union, Set.mem_Icc, Set.mem_Icc] using hx
          exact le_trans this hx'.1
        exact (hx0 (le_antisymm hxle hxge))
      exact hxpos.ne'
    have hrec : ContinuousOn (fun x : ℝ => 1 / x) (uIcc a b) := by
      refine (continuous_const.div ?_).continuousOn
      refine continuous_id.continuousOn
    exact hlog.sub hrec
  have hderiv :
      ∀ x ∈ uIcc a b, HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => log x - 1 / x) (1 / x + 1 / x ^ 2) x := by
    intro x hx
    have hx0 : x ≠ 0 := by
      intro hx0
      have : x = 0 := hx0
      exact this (by
        have : 0 ∉ uIcc a b := this
        exact this (by simpa [this] using hx))
    have hxpos : 0 < x := by
      have hx' : a ≤ x ∧ x ≤ b ∨ b ≤ x ∧ x ≤ a := by
        simpa [uIcc, Set.mem_union, Set.mem_Icc] using hx
      cases hx' with
      | inl h =>
        have : 0 < a := ha
        exact lt_of_lt_of_le this h.1
      | inr h =>
        have : 0 < b := hb
        exact lt_of_lt_of_le this h.1
    have hlog : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => log x) (1 / x) x := by
      simpa [one_div] using (Real.hasDerivAt_log hxpos.ne')
    have hinv : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => 1 / x) (-(1 / x ^ 2)) x := by
      simpa [one_div, pow_two] using (hasDerivAt_inv x)
    have : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => log x - 1 / x) (1 / x - (-(1 / x ^ 2))) x :=
      hlog.sub hinv
    simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm] using this
  have := intervalIntegral.integral_eq_sub_of_hasDerivAt_of_le hab.le hcont hderiv
  -- evaluate at endpoints
  simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, one_div, pow_two, ha0, hb0, div_eq_mul_inv, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm,
    mul_comm, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm] using this

have h₁ : ∫ x in a..b, (1 / x : ℝ) = log b - log a := by
    simpa [one_div] using intervalIntegral.integral_inv ha.ne' hb.ne'
  have h₂ : ∫ x in a..b, (1 / x ^ 2 : ℝ) = 1 / a - 1 / b := by
    simpa using intervalIntegral.integral_one_div_sq ha.ne' hb.ne'
  calc
    ∫ x in a..b, 1 / x + 1 / x ^ 2
        = (∫ x in a..b, (1 / x : ℝ)) + ∫ x in a..b, (1 / x ^ 2 : ℝ) := by
            simpa [intervalIntegral.integral_add]
    _ = (log b - log a) + (1 / a - 1 / b) := by simpa [h₁, h₂]
    _ = log b + 1 / a - log a - 1 / b := by ring

simpa [one_div, sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc, mul_add, add_mul, pow_two] using
    (intervalIntegral.integral_add (a := a) (b := b) (f := fun x : ℝ => (1 : ℝ) / x)
        (g := fun x : ℝ => (1 : ℝ) / x ^ 2) ).trans
      (by
        simp [intervalIntegral.integral_inv, this, ha.ne', hb.ne', intervalIntegral.integral_inv_sq, this, ha.ne', hb.ne'] )

have ha0 : a ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt ha
  have hb0 : b ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt hb
  calc
    ∫ x in a..b, (1 / x + 1 / x ^ 2)
        = (∫ x in a..b, (1 / x)) + ∫ x in a..b, (1 / x ^ 2) := by
            simpa [intervalIntegral.integral_add]
    _ = (log b - log a) + (1 / a - 1 / b) := by
          have hlog : (∫ x in a..b, (1 / x)) = log b - log a := by
            simpa [one_div] using intervalIntegral.integral_inv ha0 hb0 this
          have hsq : (∫ x in a..b, (1 / x ^ 2)) = 1 / a - 1 / b := by
            have : (∫ x in a..b, -(1 / x ^ 2)) = (1 / b) - (1 / a) := by
              simpa [one_div, pow_two] using
                (intervalIntegral.integral_deriv_eq_sub (f := fun x : ℝ => 1 / x)
                  (f' := fun x : ℝ => -(1 / x ^ 2)) this
                  (by
                    intro x hx
                    have hx0 : x ≠ 0 := by
                      have : x ∈ uIcc a b := by
                        simpa [uIcc] using hx
                      exact fun h => this (by simpa [h] using rfl)
                    simpa [one_div, pow_two, hx0] using (Real.deriv_inv hx0))
                  (by
                    intro x hx
                    have hx0 : x ≠ 0 := by
                      have : x ∈ uIcc a b := by
                        simpa [uIcc] using hx
                      exact fun h => this (by simpa [h] using rfl)
                    simpa [one_div, pow_two, hx0] using (Real.continuous_inv₀ hx0)))
            have := congrArg Neg.neg this
            simpa [intervalIntegral.integral_neg, sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm,
              add_assoc, one_div, pow_two] using this
          simpa [hlog, hsq, sub_eq_add_neg, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm]
    _ = log b + 1 / a - log a - 1 / b := by
          ring
